description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On March 2, 2024 at 8:14 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle ("Waymo AV") operating in San Francisco, California was in a collision 
involving a dumpster on Odd Fellows Way, at the rear garage exit of 1155 Market Street.  
 
The Waymo AV was making a reversing right turn out of the parking garage onto Odd Fellows Way when the rear left corner of the 
Waymo AV made contact with a dumpster which was next to the curb in the roadway opposite the garage exit.  At the time of the impact, 
the Waymo AV's Level 4 ADS was not engaged and a test driver was operating the Waymo AV in manual mode. The Waymo AV sustained 
damage.
Print
Clear Form
